pr.title: Match the rest of HSD's pobj.c
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Completed the decompilation match for sysdolphin baselib pobj.c, replacing the remaining 3846-line assembly file with C and removing pobj.s from the build. The PR also corrected PObj-related structs and types, added GX vertex emission inline helpers needed by the matched display-list code, and made small supporting header/type fixes across baselib.
what_changed: Deleted asm/sysdolphin/baselib/pobj.s and removed it from obj_files.mk, indicating pobj.c was fully matched.

Added about 1261 lines to src/sysdolphin/baselib/pobj.c, covering PObj animation, loading, resolving references, vertex descriptor setup, shape animation display-list interpretation, matrix setup, display, release/amnesia, and class initialization logic.

Implemented or exposed many PObj APIs including HSD_PObjAddAnim, HSD_PObjAddAnimAll, HSD_PObjReqAnimByFlags, HSD_PObjReqAnimAllByFlags, HSD_PObjAnim, HSD_PObjAnimAll, HSD_PObjLoadDesc, HSD_PObjRemove, HSD_PObjRemoveAll, HSD_PObjGetDefaultClass, HSD_PObjSetDefaultClass, HSD_PObjAlloc, HSD_PObjFree, HSD_PObjResolveRefs, HSD_PObjResolveRefsAll, HSD_ClearVtxDesc, HSD_PObjClearMtxMark, HSD_PObjSetMtxMark, HSD_PObjGetMtxMark, and HSD_PObjDisp.

Refined PObj data structures in pobj.h: replaced an unknown x14 union member with meaningful jobj, shape_set, and envelope_list uses; defined matrix type constants HSD_MTX_RIGID and HSD_MTX_ENVELOPE; made HSD_VtxDescList fields use GXAttr, GXAttrType, GXCompCnt, and GXCompType; changed shape index counts to s32; represented shape-set blend data as a union; and added an HSD_AObj* aobj field to HSD_ShapeSet.
Updated users of the old unknown shape animation field from cur->u.x14_unk->aobj to cur->u.shape_set->aobj in lb_00B0.c and aobj.c.
Added src/dolphin/gx/GXVert.h with static inline GXPosition*, GXNormal*, GXColor*, GXTexCoord*, GXMatrixIndex1u8, and GXEnd helpers used to emit display-list vertex data from C.
Adjusted hsdIsDescendantOf to take void* arguments and cast through HSD_CLASS_INFO where needed, matching the PR body note about correcting function types.
Moved hsdDelete from dobj.c into class.h as a reusable static inline helper.
Added HSD_IDGetData inline wrapper in id.h, HSD_JObjRefThis inline in jobj.h, and shared iref_INC in object.h; renamed the local jobj.c version to jobj_iref_INC to avoid collision.
Corrected HSD_A_S_W0 from 8 to 2 in baselib forward.h.
Renamed/reshaped HSD_PerfStat fields from an unknown/count array layout to nb_mtx_load and env_blend, updated HSD_PerfCountEnvelopeBlending, and added HSD_PerfCountMtxLoad inline.
smart_moves: The PR did not only transliterate pobj.s into C; it first cleaned up the surrounding types and headers so the matched C could express the original data model directly.
Replacing the unknown PObj shape-animation member with HSD_ShapeSet and its aobj field made existing animation-rate/request code self-documenting and reduced downstream unknown-field usage.
Introducing GXVert.h inline FIFO-style vertex emission helpers allowed display-list interpretation code to be written in C while preserving low-level GX write patterns needed for matching.
Using typed GX enums in HSD_VtxDescList captured real API semantics and made large switch-heavy vertex descriptor code more reliable than raw u32 fields.

Centralizing tiny inline helpers such as hsdDelete, HSD_IDGetData, HSD_JObjRefThis, iref_INC, and HSD_PerfCountMtxLoad reduced duplicated local helpers and supported matching across multiple baselib files.
The final assembly removal and obj_files.mk update provide strong evidence that the decompiled C fully replaced the remaining PObj assembly.
decomp_lessons: For large baselib matches, unknown struct cleanup can be a prerequisite to matching code generation; matching pobj.c depended on correctly modeling PObj, ShapeSet, VtxDescList, envelope, animation, and perf data.
When a decompiled file interacts with hardware-facing APIs, adding accurate inline SDK wrappers can be preferable to leaving raw stores or assembly stubs.
Field names should be upgraded as soon as code proves their meaning: x14_unk became shape_set/envelope_list/jobj depending on PObj type, and ShapeSet gained a named aobj field.
Use exact SDK-style enum types in headers when possible; replacing raw u32 vertex descriptor fields with GXAttr/GXAttrType/GXCompCnt/GXCompType documents intent and can affect matching.

Assembly deletion PRs often require small cross-file signature changes; here hsdIsDescendantOf, ref helpers, ID lookup wrappers, and perf counters were adjusted to satisfy both type correctness and codegen.
Static inline helper placement matters for decompilation: moving hsdDelete into a header and adding inline GX/HSD helpers made call sites compile in the expected shape.
naming_conventions: Public PObj APIs use the HSD_PObj prefix and Pascal-style verb phrases, e.g. HSD_PObjLoadDesc, HSD_PObjResolveRefsAll, HSD_PObjDisp.
Private file-local helpers use lower/camel or descriptive names such as loadEnvelopeDesc, loadShapeSetDesc, resolveEnvelope, setupVtxDesc, drawShapeAnim, and interpretShapeAnimDisplayList.
Class metadata follows baselib convention: HSD_PObjInfo hsdPObj with PObjInfoInit and HSD_POBJ_INFO/HSD_POBJ_METHOD macros.
Matrix type constants introduced in pobj.h use HSD_MTX_RIGID and HSD_MTX_ENVELOPE.
Unknown fields should be replaced with semantic union member names once understood: jobj, shape_set, envelope_list instead of x14_unk.
Local helper renaming can avoid header-inline conflicts, as shown by jobj.c changing iref_INC to jobj_iref_INC after adding iref_INC to object.h.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed a 3846-line pobj.s file after replacing the remaining functions with matched C.
Added static inline GX vertex helpers for exact low-level emission functions such as GXPosition3f32, GXNormal3f32, GXTexCoord*, GXColor*, GXMatrixIndex1u8, and GXEnd.

Matched shape animation display-list code by decoding GX opcodes, vertex formats, and descriptor arrays, then re-emitting vertex, normal, NBT, texcoord, color, and matrix-index data through GX inline helpers.
Used explicit shape vertex/normal/NBT extraction helpers for different GX component types and index sizes, rather than leaving raw pointer arithmetic undocumented.
Preserved class-system call patterns via hsdSearchClassInfo, hsdNew, method-table load callbacks, release/destroy helpers, and default-class initialization.
Changed helper signatures and types, such as hsdIsDescendantOf(void*, void*), where type flexibility was needed to match original call patterns.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that modify HSD_ShapeSet or PObj shape animation fields after x14_unk was removed.
Search for follow-up changes to GXVert.h inline functions or display-list emission helpers.
Check whether hsdIsDescendantOf(void*, void*) was further refined or reverted in later baselib matching work.
Look for later PRs using HSD_PerfCountMtxLoad or env_blend to validate the perf struct layout.
Search for PObj display-list interpretation bugs involving GX_INDEX8, GX_INDEX16, GX_VA_NBT, or shape animation buffers.
